title: Touchstone Partners, Spice Route Legal act on Nova IVF's acquisition of Craft Fertility Centre
description: Nova IVF Fertility, the fertility care vertical of Asia Healthcare Holdings, has acquired a majority stake in Kerala-based Craft Fertility Centre Private Limited, at a valuation of $40 million. Touchstone Partners advised Nova IVF on this transaction. The transaction team consisted of Anirudh Agarwala (Partner), Pranjal Doshi (Counsel), Associates Divya Shrivastava, Amisha Agarwal and Neelima Hande. Anirudh AgarwalaSpice Route Legal advised Craft Fertility Centre and its promoters
